request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values both national security and personal freedom, I've been thinking about conscription. While I understand the arguments for it, I worry about the strain it would put on our families and communities. We already have a strong all-volunteer force, and forcing service could actually weaken our military by creating resentment. Plus, in today's complex world, isn't it better to have professionals who are fully committed? #NationalSecurity #CivilLiberties
